name: Butter Pecan Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the squash; scoop out seeds and stringy portion; peel and cut into 3/4 to 1 inch cubes (about 4 to 5 cups).
2. In a medium saucepan, bring squash and water to a boil. Cover and cook rapidly until squash is tender (about 10 minutes).
3. Drain the squash and mash with butter, sugar, salt, and pepper.
4. Turn into an 8-inch pie plate. Sprinkle with pecans and maple syrup.
5. Broil until pecans are lightly browned.
